//: TEMPLATE — copy to config.json (gitignored) and replace every EDIT_ value before --execute. NO SECRETS HERE: private keys come from env CREATOR_WALLET_SECRET (base58) only. RPC endpoint comes from env RPC_URL (or SOLANA_RPC_URL), not this file.
//mint: $DTOUR mint — FIXED, do NOT edit. Scripts refuse to run on any other mint.
//tokenDecimals: EDIT-VERIFY: pump.fun tokens are usually 6. Confirm via getMint before distributing.
//perRunCapSol: Circuit-breaker: max total SOL a SINGLE run may DISBURSE. collect-and-split caps builder+treasury sent this run; distribute-to-holders caps the total paid to holders. A run whose outgoing total exceeds this ABORTS before any send (under --execute). Defaults to 5 if omitted. Raise deliberately for large epochs.

wallets.creator: EDIT_CREATOR_WALLET_PUBKEY
wallets.//creator: Receives collected creator fees. The tx SIGNER. Its secret is env CREATOR_WALLET_SECRET — never put a key here.
wallets.//buyback: Holds SOL earmarked for an optional buyback.
wallets.//buybackTokenDest: Where bought-back $DTOUR lands (treasury/buyback hold, or a burn address). A real burn is impossible — no mint authority — so 'burn' just means an unspendable address. Optional; only used by an optional buyback step.

splitBps.//: EDIT. MUST sum to EXACTLY 10000 or every script exits(1). Example: 30% builder / 40% holders / 20% buyback / 10% treasury.

collect.//priorityFeeSol: EDIT: PumpPortal priorityFee for the collectCreatorFee claim tx.
collect.//creatorReserveSol: EDIT: SOL left in the creator wallet after a split (buffer for future fees + tx fees). The split never drains below this.

distribution.//snapshotMethod: 'getProgramAccounts' (COMPLETE — every holder) | 'getTokenLargestAccounts' (FAST but CAPPED at top 20 — under-distributes if >20 holders).
distribution.//minBalanceTokens: EDIT: ignore owners holding fewer than this many $DTOUR.
distribution.//minPayoutSol: EDIT: dust floor — skip payouts below this (not worth the fee). Defaults to 0.001 if omitted; set 0 to disable.
distribution.//memo: Optional branding note attached (SPL Memo program) to each holder-payout tx; shows on explorers + some wallets. "" = no memo.
distribution.//excludeWallets: EDIT: token-account OWNERS removed from pro-rata. MUST include creator+builder+treasury+buyback (hard-enforced) AND the OWNER of the LP $DTOUR token account. CRITICAL: pro-rata matches on the token-account OWNER, which for a pump.fun bonding-curve / migrated AMM pool is a PROGRAM-DERIVED ADDRESS (PDA) — NOT the pool/market/mint/ATA address. Pasting the pool/market/ATA address here excludes nothing and the LP receives the largest payout. The dry-run flags any included recipient that is program-owned; use that owner PDA here.

buyback.//venue: 'jupiter' | 'pumpportal'. Buyback is OPTIONAL and not implemented by the committed scripts; this block documents intent.
